Dear Sir/Ma’am, This is to inform you under Regulation 30 read with Regulation 31A (8) of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, that the meeting of the Board of Directors of the Company will be held on Thursday, March 26, 2026 at the Registered office of the Company situated at: B-02, The First, ECS Corporate House behind Keshvbaug Party Plot, off 132 Ft. Road, Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India, 380015, to inform that the Company has received the request letters dated 18 March, 2026 and 19th March, 2026 from below promoters seeking reclassification from ‘Promoter’ category to ‘Public’ category. The details of the shareholding of the Promoters seeking reclassification are as follows: Sr. No. Name of promoter Category No. of shares % of holding seeking reclassification 1 Bharatkumar K. Management Changes.pdf_text: No. SEA2025086 19th March 2026 BSE Limited National Stock Exchange of The Calcutta Stock Phiroze Jeejeebhoy Towers, India Limited Exchange Limited Dalal Street, Exchange Plaza, C- 1, Block G, 7, Lyons Range, Murgighata, Bandra-Kurla Complex, Mumbai - 400001 Dalhousie, Bandra (East), Mumbai - Scrip Code – 526371 Kolkata - 700001 400051 Through BSE Listing Centre Scrip Code – 24131 Scrip Code – NMDC Through Listing Compliances Through NEAPS CSE India Dear Sir / Madam, Sub: Change in Directorate - Intimation of appointment of Shri Krishna Kumar Thakur as Director (Personnel) on the Board of the Company – Reg. Ref: Regulation 30 of the Securities & Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. _________________________________________________________________________ In terms of Ministry of Steel, Government of India's Order No. S-14013/1/2025-BLA dated 17th March 2026, notice is hereby given that Shri Krishna Kumar Thakur (DIN 10172666) has been appointed as Director (Personnel) in NMDC Limited for a period of five (5) years from the date of his assumption of charge of the post i.e. 19th March 2026, or until further orders, whichever is earlier. Brief Profile of Shri Krishna Kumar Thakur is enclosed at Annexure - A. Disclosure of relationship between Directors: None of the other Directors on the Board of NMDC Limited are related to Shri Krishna Kumar Thakur. We hereby affirm that Shri Krishna Kumar Thakur is not debarred from holding the office of Director by virtue of any SEBI order or any other such authority. The updated list of Directors on the Board of NMDC Limited is enclosed at Annexure - B. The above is for kind information and dissemination. Yours faithfully, for NMDC Limited (Pravin Shekhar) Company Secretary & Compliance Officer ___________________________________________________________________________ दूरभाष /Phones: 040-235387 13-21 (9 Lines), 23538723, 23538767 फै /Fax: +91-40-23538711 ई-मेल E-mail: hois@nmdc

Tel : +91-22-4286 1000 Fax : 26502001 Website : www.jswcement.in CIN :– L26957MH2006PLC160839 Date: 19.03.2026 To, BSE Limited National Stock Exchange of India Limited Phiroze Jeejeebhoy Towers, Exchange Plaza, C-1, Block G, Dalal Street, Fort, Bandra Kurla Complex, Bandra (E), Mumbai 400 001, Mumbai - 400 051 Maharashtra, India Maharashtra, India Scrip Code: 544480 Symbol: JSWCEMENT Sub: Press Release Ref: Regulation 30 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 (‘Listing Regulations’) Dear Sir/ Madam, In compliance with Regulation 30 of the Securities Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, please find enclosed a press release dated 19th March 2026, titled as “JSW CEMENT EXPANDS ITS FOOTPRINT WITH FORAY INTO NORTH INDIA”. The above is for your information and record. Thanking you, Yours sincerely, For JSW Cement Limited Sneha Bindra Company Secretary and Compliance Officer Membership No. 29721PRESS RELEASE JSW CEMENT EXPANDS ITS FOOTPRINT WITH FORAY INTO NORTH INDIA COMMENCES PRODUCTION AT NEW GREENFIELD INTEGRATED CEMENT PLANT AT NAGAUR, RAJASTHAN TAKES ITS INSTALLED GRINDING CAPACITY TO 24.1 MTPA Mumbai/Nagaur (Rajasthan), March 19, 2026: JSW Cement, one of India's leading green cement producers and part of the diversiied JSW Group, today laid a signiicant milestone in its journey of national expansion, by commencing production at the state-of- the-art, greenield, integrated cement manufacturing plant in the district of Nagaur in Rajasthan – its irst such facility in north India. With this foray into the northern region, the company’s total cement grinding capacity stands at 24.1 MTPA and the total clinker manufacturing capacity (including the clinker capacity at the company’s joint venture, JSW Cement FZC) stands at 9.74 MTPA. Management Changes.headline: Press Release on THE Lotus Palace Chettinad to host Kalai- an Art and Architecture Festival at Chetttinad, Tamil Nadu
Management Changes.pdf_text: Date: March 19, 2026 Listing Manager, BSE Limited National Stock Exchange of India Limited Corporate Relationship Department Exchange Plaza, 5th Floor Plot 1st Floor, New Trading Ring Rotunda Building, No. C-1, Block G, Bandra Kurla Complex, Phiroze Jeejeebhoy Towers, Dalal Street, Bandra (E) Mumbai – 400051, India Fort Mumbai – 400001, India Symbol: PARKHOTELS Scrip Code: 544111 ISIN No.: INE988S01028 ISIN No.: INE988S01028 Subject: Press Release on THE Lotus Palace Chettinad to host Kalai - an Art and Architecture Festival at Chettinad, Tamil Nadu Respected Sir/Ma’am, We are pleased to announce that THE Lotus Palace Chettinad, a luxury heritage hotel by Apeejay Surrendra Park Hotels Limited, will host ‘Kalai’ – the Chettinad Art and Architecture Festival, a 4- day, 3-night immersive celebration of the artistic legacy of Chettinad from 3rd to 6th April 2026. The festival is curated in collaboration with Chettinad’s iconic heritage properties – The Bangala, Visalam, Chidambara Vilas, Chettinad Mansion, and Saratha Vilas – and will offer guests a journey through architecture, culture, art, history, food, and living heritage through thoughtfully curated experiences. A press release on the captioned subject is enclosed herewith, the contents of which are self- explanatory. This is for the information of the Exchange and the members. Thanking you. Yours sincerely, For Apeejay Surrendra Park Hotels Limited Shalini Keshan (Company Secretary and Compliance Officer) Membership No.: ACS-014897THE Lotus Palace Chettinad to host Kalai - an Art and Architecture Festival at Chettinad, Tamil Nadu National, April 19, 2026: THE Lotus Palace Chettinad, a luxury heritage hotel by Apeejay Surrendra Park Hotels Limited will host ‘Kalai’, the Chettinad Art and Architecture Festival, a 4-day, 3-night immersive celebration of the artistic legacy of Chettinad from 3rd to 6th April 2026. Curated by THE Lotus Palace Chettinad in collaboration with Chettinad’s most iconic heritage properties

Dear Sir/Madam, Pursuant to Regulation 8(2) of the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 (“PIT Regulations”), we hereby inform you that the Board of Directors of the Company, at its meeting held on today, March 19, 2026, has approved amendments to the “Code of Practices and Procedures for Fair Disclosure of Unpublished Price Sensitive Information” (“Code of Fair Disclosure”). In compliance with the aforesaid Regulations, a copy of the amended Code of Fair Disclosure is enclosed herewith for your reference. The amended Code has also been uploaded on the website of the Company at www.surajindustries.org You are requested to kindly take it on your records. For Suraj Industries Ltd. Snehlata Sharma Company Secretary & Compliance Officer Encl: As aboveCODE OF FAIR DISCLOSURE OF UNPUBLISHED PRICE SENSITIVE INFORMATION UNDER REGULATION 8(1) AND SCHEDULE A OF SEBI (PROHIBITION OF INSIDER TRADING) REGULATIONS, 2015 1. Scrip Code: 507984; Trading Symbol: SERIND Subject: Intimation of change in the name of the company from “SER INDUSTRIES LIMITED” to “DESI FARMS INDIA LIMITED” Dear Sir/Madam, In continuation to our earlier intimations dated February 21, 2026 and Pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 (“SEBI Listing Regulations”), we wish to inform you that the office of the Central Processing Centre, Registrar of Companies, under the Ministry of Corporate Affairs (“MCA”), has approved the name change of the Company from “SER Industries Limited” to “Desi Farms India Limited”, pursuant to the issuance of a fresh Certificate of Incorporation dated March 19, 2026. The name of the Company, thus, stands amended to “Desi Farms India Limited” with effect from March 19, 2026, and the Memorandum and Articles of Association of the Company stands altered to the extent of the name change of the Company. A copy of Certificate of Incorporation issued by MCA is enclosed herewith. You are requested to take the above information on your records. Change in Depository Participant (DP) ID The Depository Participant (DP) ID of Ramesh Chand Agarwal (HUF) has been changed from IN302700 to IN301485. The aforesaid change has been affected pursuant to the merger of the Jaipur branch of KIFS Trade Capital Private Limited, (DP), with its Ahmedabad branch. 2. Change in Karta of HUF We regret to inform that Mr. Ramesh Chand Agrawal, the erstwhile Karta of Ramesh Chand Agarwal (HUF), has passed away. Consequent to his demise, Mr. Naresh Kumar Agarwal has been designated as the Karta of Ramesh Chand Agarwal (HUF). We further inform that the erstwhile Karta of Mohan Lal Agarwal (HUF), also passed away. Consequent to his demise, Mr. Raj Kumar Agarwal has been appointed as the Karta of Mohan Lal Agarwal (HUF). The above changes do not result in any change in the total shareholding of the Promoter Group in the Company. We request you to take the same on record. Thanking You Yours faithfully, for Lehar Footwears Limited Ritika Poddar Company Secretary & Compliance Officer ACS No. A65615

Management Changes.pdf_text: 19th March, 2026 To, General Manager The BSE Limited Phiroze Jeejeebhoy Towers, Dalal Street, Fort Mumbai Maharashtra 400001 Subject: Outcome of the meeting of Independent Directors Company Code : 540728 Dear Sir, In Compliance with Section 149 (7) read with Schedule IV of the Companies Act, 2013 and Regulations 25(3) of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015, a separate Board Meeting of Independent Directors of the Company was held today i.e. 19th March, 2026 wherein, the following items in agenda were discussed: 1. Reviewed the performance of Non-Independent Directors and the Board as a whole. 2. Reviewed the performance of the Chairperson of the company and taking into account the views of Executive Directors and Non-Executive Directors; 3. Assessed the quality, quantity and timeliness of flow of information between the Company Management and the Board that is necessary for the Board to effectively and reasonably perform their duties. The meeting was commenced at 03.30 p.m. and concluded at 4:15 p.m. Thanking You, For, Sayaji Industries Limited (Vishnu H Thaker) Company Secretary & Compliance Officer (ACS-60441) (This is digitally signed document hence stamp is not required.) Management Changes.pdf_text: Date : 19th March, 2026 The General Manager, The Vice-President, Listing Department Listing Department BSE Limited National Stock Exchange of India Limited Phiroze Jeejeebhoy Towers, “Exchange Plaza”, Dalal Street, Bandra – Kurla Complex, Mumbai 400 001 Bandra (E), Mumbai – 400 051 Scrip Code : 533160 Scrip Symbol : DBREALTY Dear Sir/Madam, Subject: Letter of Award issued by the Government of Goa (Department of Public Private Partnership) to the Company for development of an International Convention Centre, Convention Hotel and associated downstream facilities at Dona Paula, Goa Pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, we hereby inform that the Company has received a Letter of Award dated 18th March 2026 from the Government of Goa (Department of Public Private Partnership) for development of an International Convention Centre, Convention Hotel and associated downstream facilities at Dona Paula, Goa on a Design, Build, Finance, Operate and Transfer (DBFOT) basis. The award has been received pursuant to a competitive bidding process initiated by the Government of Goa under a Public Private Partnership framework. The project is proposed to be developed on a leasehold land parcel admeasuring approximately 2,84,775 sq. metres (~70 acres) at Dona Paula, Goa, under a long-term concession arrangement. The scope of the project broadly comprises: • Development of an International Convention Centre with large-capacity convention and exhibition facilities; • Development of a Convention Hotel; and • Development of permitted downstream facilities, including hospitality, retail and other commercial uses, on the balance land, in accordance with applicable laws and development regulations. The project is structured as an integrated mixed-use development, with mandatory infrastructure components and permitted revenue-generating facilities to be developed over the concession period. As part of the award, the Company is

Management Changes.pdf_text: Date: 19.03.2026 To, To, BSE Limited, National Stock exchange of India Limited, Listing Department, P.J. Towers, Dalal Exchange Plaza, C-1, Block G, Street, Mumbai – 400 001 Bandra Kurla Complex, Bandra (E) Scrip Code: 532694 Mumbai – 400 051 Symbol: ASMS Dear Sir/Madam, Sub: Intimation regarding Press Release under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 Pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, please find enclosed a copy of the Press Release being issued by the Company today titled: “Avio Smart Market Stack Limited Signs MoU with Kissan Agri Mall to Strengthen Retail Agri Ecosystem.” A copy of the said Press Release is enclosed herewith as Annexure – I. You are requested to kindly take the above information on record. Yours faithfully, For Avio Smart Market Stack Limited (Formerly Known as Bartronics India Limited) Diksha Omer Company SecretaryANNEXURE-I Avio Smart Market Stack Limited Signs MoU with Kissan Agri Mall to Strengthen Retail Agri Ecosystem National| March 19th, 2026: Avio Smart Market Stack Limited (ASMS), formerly known as Bartronics India Limited, has entered into a strategic partnership with Kissan Agri Mall Private Limited to accelerate the deployment of a technology-driven agri-retail and supply chain ecosystem under Project AVIO Agritech. The partnership brings together ASMS’s deep rural distribution network, digital infrastructure, and financial inclusion capabilities with Kissan Agri Mall’s strong on-ground presence in agri-input retail and farmer engagement. Together, the companies aim to build a scalable “phygital” platform integrating agri-input distribution, advisory services, output market linkages, and post-harvest infrastructure. ASMS has established a significant presence across 5000 villages in India through its financial inclusion network, and, under Project AVIO Agritech, the company is expanding into agriculture, sustainability, and rural commerce by partnerin

Mergers & Schemes.pdf_text: Leading Through Innovation March 19, 2026 To To BSE Limited National Stock Exchange of India Ltd Corporate Relationship Dept., Corporate Relationship Dept., Phiroze Jeejeebhoy Towers, Exchange Plaza, Plot No. C/1, G Block, Dalal Street, Mumbai 400001 Bandra-Kurla Complex, Bandra (East), Mumbai 400 051 Scrip Code: 544283 Symbol: ACMESOLAR Reference: Regulation 30 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 Subject: Update on commissioning of additional 4 MW out of 100 MW capacity of wind power project by ACME Eco Clean Energy Private Limited, a subsidiary of ACME Solar Holdings Limited Dear Sir/Madam, In continuation of our intimations dated October 17, 2025, November 03, 2025, November 19, 2025, December 09, 2025, December 16, 2025, December 24, 2025, January 06, 2026, January 17, 2026, January 23, 2026, February 02, 2026, February 07, 2026, March 09, 2026 and March 17, 2026, we wish to inform that ACME Eco Clean Energy Private Limited, a subsidiary of ACME Solar Holdings Limited, has commissioned additional 4 MW out of 100 MW wind power project at Village: Titoda, Taluka: Sayla, Dist: Surendaranagar, Gujarat. The commissioning has been witnessed and confirmed by Gujarat Energy Development Agency (“GEDA”) and Paschim Gujarat Vij Company Limited (“PGVCL”) officials, and the formal certificate is expected to be issued shortly. With this, ACME Eco Clean Energy Private Limited has achieved a commissioned capacity of 88 MW out of 100 MW. You are requested to take the same on your record. Thanking you, For ACME Solar Holdings Limited Rajesh Sodhi Company Secretary and Compliance Officer ACME Solar Holdings Limited (formerly ACME Solar Holdings Private Limited) CIN: L40106HR2015PLC102129 Regd.. Office : Plot No .152, Sector-44, Gurugram 122002, Haryana, India Tel: +91-124-7117000 Fax : +91-124-7117001 Email : cs.acme@acme.in; Website: www.acmesolar.in;

We refer to our disclosure dated March 17, 2026, relating to oral pronouncement of order by Hon’ble National Company Law Tribunal, Allahabad Bench at Prayagraj (the “Hon’ble NCLT”) approving the resolution plan dated October 14, 2025 (read with email clarifications dated November 5, 2025) (“Approved Resolution Plan”) submitted by Adani Enterprises Limited (“AEL” or “Resolution Applicant”) for acquisition of Jaiprakash Associates Limited (“JAL”), a company that has been undergoing Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (“CIRP”) under the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016. This is to inform that the Hon’ble NCLT has placed the said order on its website on March 18, 2026, a copy of which is enclosed herewith as Annexure A. The CIRP of JAL was initiated on June 3, 2024, and Mr. Bhuvan Madan was appointed as the Resolution Professional. The resolution plan submitted by the Company was approved by the Committee of Creditors with a voting share of 93.81% on November 18, 2025. Regulatory & BSE Queries.headline: Intimation for Admission of Co. under CIRP and appointment of IRP
Regulatory & BSE Queries.pdf_text: Date:19/03/2026 To, The Secretary BSE LIMITED P J Towers, Dalal Street, Fort, Mumbai 400 001 Company Code No. : 539561 Subject: Intimation of Admission of Company under CIRP and Appointment of Interim Resolution Professional Ref: Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 Dear Sir/Madam, We wish to inform you that the Hon’ble National Company Law Tribunal, Mumbai Bench- VI (“NCLT”), vide its order dated 17th March, 2026, has admitted the application filed under Section 9 of the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016 (“IBC”) against Remedium Lifecare Limited now SUPHA PHARMACHEM LIMITED (“the Company”) and NCLT has initiated the Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP). Key highlights of the Order are as follows: 1. Admission of CIRP: The petition bearing C.P. (IB) No. 579/MB/2025 filed by Boston Ivy Healthcare Solution Private Limited has been admitted under Section 9 of the IBC. 2. Moratorium: The Hon’ble NCLT has declared a moratorium under Section 14 of the IBC with effect from 17th March, 2026, prohibiting, inter alia: o Institution or continuation of suits or proceedings against the Company o Transfer or disposal of assets of the Company o Enforcement of security interest o Recovery of property3. Appointment of IRP: The Hon’ble NCLT has appointed Mr. Rajesh Jhunjhunwala (IBBI Registration No.: IBBI/IPA-003/IP-N00457/2017-18/11102) as the Interim Resolution Professional (IRP) to carry out the CIRP of the Company. Contact details of IRP: Email: jhunjhunwala.rajesh@gmail.com 4. Suspension of Board Powers: In terms of Section 17 of the IBC, the powers of the Board of Directors of the Company stand suspended and are vested with the IRP. 5. Public Announcement: The IRP shall make a public announcement of the initiation of CIRP and call for submission of claims. This intimation is being submitted pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. You are requested to take the same on record. For SUPHA PHA
Regulatory & BSE Queries.clean_headline: Supha Pharmachem (formerly Remedium Lifecare) admitted under Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process by NCLT with appointment of Interim Resolution Professional.

Order Wins.pdf_text: March 19, 2026 To, Manager–CRD, BSE Ltd., Scrip Code: 532705 Phiroze Jeejeebhoy Towers, ISIN No.: INE199G01027 Dalal Street, Mumbai-400001 Listing Manager, National Stock Exchange of India Ltd., Symbol: JAGRAN ‘Exchange Plaza’, Bandra Kurla Complex, ISIN No.: INE199G01027 Dalal Street, Bandra (E), Mumbai-400 051 Dear Sir / Madam, Sub.: Disclosure under Regulation 30 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 This is in furtherance to the disclosure made on 27th February, 2026, under Regulations 30(3), 30(4) read with Para B, Part A of Schedule III of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements), 2015 by Jagran Prakashan Limited (“JPL” / “Company”). The Company Petitions titled “Mahendra Mohan Gupta and Ors v. Devendra Mohan Gupta and Ors., C.P. No. 64 of 2023”, and “Shailendra Mohan Gupta and Ors v. Jagran Media Network Investment Private Limited and Ors., C.P. No. 57 of 2025”, along with C.A. Nos. 04, 05 and 06 of 2026 filed in C.P. No. 64 of 2023 were listed today i.e., 19th March, 2026, before the Hon’ble NCLT, Allahabad. After hearing the parties, the Hon’ble NCLT, Allahabad reserved orders in the three applications and has directed that the proposed Extra-ordinary general meeting of JPL, requisitioned by Jagran Media Network Investment Private Limited (“JMNIPL”), holding company of JPL, seeking removal of 7 Independent Directors, and 1 director from the office of WTD, be deferred for the time being, and the said requisition, be kept in abeyance, till disposal of the said company applications. The main Company Petitions, i.e., C.P. No. 64 of 2023 and C.P. No. 57 of 2025, have been listed on 16th April, 2026 at 2:30 p.m. for further hearing. The above is subject to a signed copy of the order passed by the Hon’ble NCLT, which shall also be shared once the same is uploaded. Please note that we shall next provide a disclosure/update when there is a material development in the proceeding

Ltd.  The launch marks India’s first foldable next-gen pMDI (pressurised Metered-Dose Inhaler) enhancer Ahmedabad, 19 March, 2026 Zydus Lifesciences Limited (“Zydus”), an innovation-led life-sciences company with an international presence, has launched Aerolife Mini™, a next-generation pMDI enhancer marking a significant step in the company’s strategy to drive drug device led innovation that in respiratory care. Aerolife Mini™ is India’s first portable and foldable spacer, making it highly convenient to use. Zydus has launched this device under an exclusive licensing arrangement with AeroDel Technology Innovations Pvt. Ltd. India faces a significant and growing burden of chronic respiratory diseases such as asthma, chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD), and bronchiectasis, driven by factors such as rising air pollution, smoking, recurrent infections, and delayed diagnosis. Millions of patients rely on long-term inhaled therapy to control symptoms, reduce exacerbations, and maintain their quality of life. While inhaled

Board Decisions.headline: Press Release - Delhivery Announces Appointment of Ms. Neelam Dhawan as Independent Director and Board Chairperson
Board Decisions.pdf_text: Date: March 19, 2026 BSE Limited National Stock Exchange of India Limited Phiroze Jeejeebhoy Towers, Exchange Plaza, C-1, Block G, Dalal Street, Bandra Kurla Complex, Mumbai – 400 001, India Bandra (E), Mumbai – 400 051, India Scrip Code: 543529 Symbol: DELHIVERY Sub: Press Release – Delhivery Announces Appointment of Ms. Neelam Dhawan as Independent Director and Board Chairperson Dear Sir/ Madam, Please find enclosed herewith a copy of the press release being issued by the Company titled “Delhivery Announces Appointment of Ms. Neelam Dhawan as Independent Director and Board Chairperson”. The disclosure under Regulation 30 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, is separately filed by the Company before this press release. This press release will also be hosted on the Company’s website at www.delhivery.com You are requested to take this on record. Thank you. Yours sincerely, For Delhivery Limited Madhulika Rawat Company Secretary & Compliance Officer Membership No: F8765 Encl. As aboveDelhivery Announces Appointment of Ms. Neelam Dhawan as Independent Director and Board Chairperson Gurugram, India – March 19, 2026 – Delhivery today announced the appointment of Ms. Neelam Dhawan as a Non-Executive Independent Director, effective March 20, 2026. Ms. Dhawan will also be designated as the Chairperson of the Board of Directors, effective April 1, 2026. She succeeds Mr. Deepak Kapoor, who is stepping down from the Board of Delhivery after a tenure of over eight years, as announced in Delhiveryʼs regulatory filing on January 31, 2026. “We are delighted to welcome Neelam Dhawan to the Delhivery Board as our Chairperson. Her exceptional track record in leading some of the worldʼs most iconic technology companies, as well as her diverse set of experiences as a seasoned Board Member will be invaluable as Delhivery continues to scale its technology-led logistics platform. Neelamʼs leadership will further

Board Decisions.pdf_text: WLL/SEC/2026 March 19, 2026 To Bombay Stock Exchange Limited National Stock Exchange of India Limited Department of Corporate Services, Listing Compliance Department SP. J. Towers, Dalal Street, Exchange Plaza, Bandra-Kurla Complex, Mumbai – 400 001 Bandra (E), Mumbai – 400 051 (Scrip Code-514162) (Symbol: WELSPUNLIV) Dear Sir / Madam, Sub: Outcome of the meeting of the Board of Directors of Welspun Living Limited (the Company) held on March 19, 2026. Pursuant to Regulation 30 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 (Listing Regulations), we would like to inform you that the Board of Directors at its meeting today, i.e. Thursday, March 19, 2026, has, inter alia: A) Approved the acquisition of stake in Welspun Corporate Services Limited (Formerly known as Welpsun Home Textiles Limited) : The Board of Directors of the Company at its meeting held today approved acquisition of 3,500 (Three Thousand Five Hundred only) equity shares of Rs. 10/- each of “Welspun Corporate Services Limited” (“WCSL”) (formerly known as Welspun Home Textiles Limited) representing 35% of the total paid-up equity share capital of WCSL at a consideration of Rs. 35,000/-. The balance 65% will be acquired by other Welspun Group entities. WCSL is being positioned as a centralized corporate services platform for Welspun Group entities, providing integrated management and support services including human resources, legal, regulatory and compliance, taxation, corporate restructuring, mergers and amalgamations, strategic advisory and other corporate services. The proposed acquisition is intended to support the establishment and strengthening of WCSL as a centralized umbrella entity for delivering corporate services across the Welspun Group. Consequent to the above acquisition, WCSL will become an associate company of the Company. Simultaneously, the Company and other Welspun Group entities shall be entering into a joint sharehold

PRESS RELEASE SJVN achieves 1 billion units generation milestone at 1,000 MW Bikaner Solar Power Project SJVN Limited has achieved a significant milestone with its 1000 MW Bikaner Solar Power Project by successfully generating 1 Billion Units (BU) of energy on March 20, 2026. This achievement marks a major step in the company’s mission to contribute clean and sustainable energy to the national grid. The project is located in Bikaner district of Rajasthan and is being implemented through its wholly owned subsidiary, SJVN Green Energy Limited (SGEL). The GCC client has taken up 1140 seats at IndiQube Orchid, spread across multiple floors. The deal is valued around ₹ 54 Crores over the tenure of 5 years. Commenting on the development, Rishi Das, Cofounder, IndiQube says, “Over the last few years, we have seen GCCs evolve into strategic hubs that drive innovation and deliver global outcomes. The Company clarifies that the examinations were conducted in accordance with established processes, applicable guidelines and audit protocols. The Company will keep the Stock Exchanges informed of any material developments in this regard, if any. Other Disclosures.pdf_text: 19th March 2026 To: National Stock Exchange of India BSE Limited (Scrip Code: 532809) Limited (Scrip Code: FSL) Phiroze Jeejeebhoy Towers, Exchange Plaza, Dalal Street, Plot no. C/1, G Block, Mumbai - 400 001 Bandra-Kurla Complex Bandra (East), Mumbai - 400 051 Dear Madam/ Sir, Sub: Press Release This is to inform that a Press Release titled – “Firstsource Introduces Intelligence That Operates - A Full-Stack, Agent-First Model That Closes the Enterprise AI Deployment Gap” is attached along with this letter. You are kindly requested to take the same on record and oblige. Thanking you, For Firstsource Solutions Limited Pooja Nambiar Company Secretary Encl.: A/a Firstsource Solutions Ltd 1st Floor, Athena Towers, Mindspace Malad, Goregaon (W), Mumbai – 400 063 India Tel: +91 (22) 6666 0888 | Fax: +91 (22) 6666 0887 | Web: www.firstsource.com (CIN: L64202MH2001PLC134147)PRESS RELEASE Firstsource Introduces Intelligence That Operates A Full-Stack, Agent-First Model That Closes the Enterprise AI Deployment Gap New York | Mumbai | March 19, 2026: Firstsource Solutions Limited (NSE: FSL, BSE: 532809), an RP-Sanjiv Goenka Group company, today launched Intelligence That Operates, a full-stack, agent-first operating model to design, build, and run AI-powered enterprise operations — with outcomes underwritten, not promised. The announcement marks a significant evolution of the company's UnBPO™ platform and a direct response to what has become the defining challenge of the agentic era. AI capability has never been greater — and yet for most enterprises, the operational reality on the ground has barely shifted. Pilots stall. Investments fail to translate into measurable outcomes. The gap between what AI can do and what businesses actually get from it keeps widening. The barrier, Firstsource argues, is not the technology. It is the operating model. Enterprises are trying to bolt AI onto structures built for a different era — siloed teams, linear handoffs, effort-based contracts, a

Debt & Finance.pdf_text: Cement Limited JSW Centre Opp. MMRDA Ground, Bandra Kurla Complex, Bandra (East), Mumbai - 400 051. Tel : +91-22-4286 1000 Fax : 26502001 Website : www.jswcement.in CIN :– L26957MH2006PLC160839 Date:19.03.2026 BSE Limited National Stock Exchange of India Limited Phiroze Jeejeebhoy Towers, Exchange Plaza, C-1, Block G, Dalal Street, Fort, Bandra Kurla Complex, Bandra (E), Mumbai 400 001, Mumbai - 400 051 Maharashtra, India Maharashtra, India Scrip Code: 544480 Symbol: JSWCEMENT Sub.: Disclosure under Regulation 30 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, as amended - Commissioning of integrated cement plant Dear Sir/Madam, Pursuant to the Regulation 30 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, as amended, we wish to inform you that the Company has successfully commissioned its greenfield integrated cement plant located in Nagaur Rajasthan, with a cement grinding capacity of 2.5 MTPA and clinkerisation capacity of 3.3 MTPA. This expansion marks JSW Cement’s first production unit in North India. With commissioning of the above plant, JSW Cement’s total grinding capacity has increased to 24.1 MTPA. The total clinker manufacturing capacity of the Company (including the clinker capacity at its joint venture, JSW Cement FZC) stands at 9.74 MTPA. The aforesaid information is also being uploaded on the website of the Company at https://www.jswcement.in/. You are requested to kindly take the above on record. Thanking you Yours sincerely, For JSW Cement Limited Sneha Bindra Company Secretary and Compliance Officer Membership No. 29721

In February 2023, the Notes of USD 247.793 million in aggregate principal amount were bought back & cancelled by HCL America Inc. Date: 19" March 2026 To, BSE Limited, Phiroze Jeejeebhoy Towers, Dalal Street, Mumbai — 400001 Scrip Code: 544329 Subject: Intimation under Regulation 30 — Execution of Supply Agreement by Subsidiary Ref: Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 Dear Sir/Madam, We wish to inform you that Leo Dryfruits & Spices Trading Limited (“the Company”), through its subsidiary Vandu Food Processing Private Limited (“VFPPL”), has entered into a Supply Agreement with Haldiram Marketing Private Limited (“Haldiram”) with an effective date of 19*" March 2026. Under the said agreement, VFPPL shall undertake processing and supply of processed cashew nuts, related products and other food products in accordance with the specifications, quality standards, and instructions provided by Haldiram. The agreement involves processing of raw cashew nuts into finished products, including broken cashew pieces and cashew powder, and supply of the same to Haldiram. This engagement reflects the confidence of a reputed FMCG player in the Company’s capabilities and is expected to strengthen the Company’s presence in the food processing segment, enhance its market position, and create additional growth opportunities. Analyst / Investor Meets.pdf_text: March 19, 2026 National Stock Exchange of India Limited BSE Limited Exchange Plaza, P. J. Towers, Dalal Street, Bandra Kurla Complex, Mumbai Samachar Marg, Bandra (East), Mumbai - 400 001 Mumbai - 400 051 Symbol: LUPIN Scrip Code: Equity - 500257 Subject: Disclosure pursuant to Regulation 30 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 Dear Sir/Madam, We are pleased to enclose a Press Release titled “Lupin Manufacturing Solutions Announces Expansion of Manufacturing Facility at Dabhasa, India”. The same is for your information and dissemination. Thanking you, For LUPIN LIMITED AMIT KUMAR GUPTA COMPANY SECRETARY & COMPLIANCE OFFICER (ACS -15754) Encl.: a/a. LUPIN LIMITED Registered Office: 3rd Floor, Kalpataru Inspire, Off W. E. Highway, Santacruz (East), Mumbai - 400 055 India. Tel: (91-22) 6640 2323. Corporate Identity Number: L24100MH1983PLC029442 info@lupin.com | www.lupin.comPress Release BSE: 500257 NSE: LUPIN REUTERS: LUPIN.BO BLOOMBERG: LPCIN Lupin Manufacturing Solutions Announces Expansion of Manufacturing Facility at Dabhasa, India Strategic expansion strengthens complex development and manufacturing capabilities Mumbai, March 19, 2026: Lupin Manufacturing Solutions (LMS), a global CRDMO and subsidiary of global pharma major Lupin Limited (Lupin), today announced a strategic expansion of its Dabhasa manufacturing facility, marking a significant step toward scaling its peptide building-blocks platform and CRDMO capabilities. The expanded infrastructure features a new block to enhance existing CRDMO capabilities supported by dedicated peptide manufacturing capacity across two additional specialized units. These upgrades will enable advanced development and flexible manufacturing, supporting complex therapeutics and meeting global demand for advanced pharmaceutical solutions. Email id- hello@bluegod.in , Website: https://bluegod.in/ Tel. 7383380911 Date: 19th March, 2026 To, The General Manager, Corporate Relationship Department, BSE Limited, Phiroz Jeejeebhoy Tower, Dalal Street, Mumbai — 400001, Maharashtra, India Reference: ISIN - INE924N01024; Scrip Code- 539175; Symbol- BLUEGOD Subject: Intimation under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. Dear Sir/Ma’am, With reference to our earlier disclosure dated February 28, 2026, wherein it was informed that a Term Sheet had been executed between Absolute Legends Sports Private Limited (“Assignor”) and Bluegod Entertainment Limited (“Assignee”) to outline the primary terms and conditions for entering into an Intellectual Property Assignment Agreement (“Assignment Agreement”) in relation to the Legends League Cricket. In this regard, we wish to inform that the Hon’ble High Court of Delhi, vide its order dated March 18, 2026, (order uploaded on High Court of Delhi website on 19.03.2026), has passed an ad-interim order restraining Absolute Legends Sports Private Limited from creating any third-party rights or transferring, assigning, or otherwise dealing with the media and commercial rights relating to the Legends League Cricket Master T20 tournament. In compliance of the aforesaid order of the Hon’ble High Court of Delhi, Bluegod Entertainment Limited have decided currently not to proceed further with signing and execution of the Assignment Agreement with Absolute Legends Sports Private Limited for transfer of Intellectual Property and Intellectual Property Rights relating to Legends League Cricket, presently owned and controlled by Absolute Legends Sports Private Limited, for commercialization, promotion, and exploitation purposes. You are requested to please take the same in your record. Thanking you Yo

Press Releases.pdf_text: 19th March, 2026 Scrip Code : ANSALAPI Scrip Code: 500013 National Stock Exchange of BSE Limited India Limited 25th Floor, Exchange Plaza, Phiroze Jeejeebhoy Bandra–Kurla Complex, Towers, Dalal Street, Bandra (East) Mumbai – 400 001 Mumbai – 400 051 Reg: Prior intimation - 50th Meeting of the Committee of Creditors for ‘Fernhill project’ of Ansal Properties and Infrastructure Limited (APIL), situated at District Gurgaon, Haryana, to be held on the 23rd March, 2026. Ref: (i) Vide Order dated the 13th January, 2023 of Hon'ble National Company Law Appellate Tribunal, New Delhi (NCLAT) - Adjudicating Authority admitting Section 7 application shall confine to ‘Fernhill project’ situated at District Gurgaon (Initially, APIL was admitted into Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process vide Order dated the 16th November, 2022 passed by the Hon'ble National Company Law Tribunal, New Delhi Bench, Court-II). (ii) Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, as amended. Dear Sir/Madam, With reference to the captioned matter and in compliance with the Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, as amended, kindly note that the 50th Meeting of the Committee of Creditors for ‘Fernhill project’ of Ansal Properties and Infrastructure Limited, situated at District Gurgaon, Haryana, is scheduled to be held on the 23rd March, 2026. This is for your information and records. Thanking you. 1) Vide Hon’ble NCLAT order dated the 07th January, 2026, Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process under Insolvency and Yours faithfully, Bankruptcy Code, 2016 has now been confined to Lucknow and Rajasthan projects (as per settlement agreement dated 03rd For Ansal Properties and March, 2022 between IL&FS Financial Services Limited and Ansal Infrastructure Limited Properties and Infrastructure Limited) of the Company in CP No.: IB 558(ND)/2024. These Projects are currently managed by Shri Navneet Kumar Gupta, Resolu

Phiroze Jeejeebhoy Towers, Exchange Plaza, Bandra Kurla Complex, Dalal Street, Fort, Mumbai-400001 Bandra (E), Mumbai-400051 Through: BSE Listing Centre Through: NEAPS Scrip Code: 532644 Scrip Code: JKCEMENT Sub: Disclosure under Regulation 30 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, as amended - Declaration as Preferred Bidder in the e-Auction for Itauri-Jharkua Limestone Block, situated in Panna, Madhya Pradesh Dear Sir/Madam, Pursuant to the Regulation 30 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, as amended, we wish to inform you that the Company has participated in the e-auction conducted by the Government Madhya Pradesh wherein the Company has been declared as the ‘Preferred Bidder’ for the Mining lease of Itauri-Jharkua Limestone Block (spreads over an area of 350 hectares), situated in Panna, Madhya Pradesh. Press Releases.pdf_text: IDAL/2025-26/SE/119 March 19, 2026 National Stock Exchange of India Ltd Scrip Symbol - INTELLECT BSE Ltd. Scrip Code – 538835 Dear Sir/Madam, Sub: Press Release - Deal Win: Bulkley Valley Credit Union selects Intellect’s AI-first eMACH.ai Lending and PF Credit to modernize its loan origination Intellect Design Arena Ltd., a financial technology company powering the world’s leading banks, credit unions, and insurance companies, is helping to transform Bulkley Valley Credit Union (BVCU)’s lending capability. By implementing Intellect’s eMACH.ai Lending loan origination capability, BVCU replaces manual workflows with an automated credit evaluation and recommendation engine, significantly accelerating the borrowing process for its 17,000 members across both personal and business loans. Further, PF Credit, a suite of AI-based digital experts, accelerates the loan origination process. BVCU’s selection of eMACH.ai Lending and PF Credit follows its choice of Intellect’s eMACH.ai Digital Engagement Platform in December 2025 to provide an integrated digital experience for its members. Please find enclosed herewith a copy of the proposed Media Release dated March 19, 2026, titled - Bulkley Valley Credit Union selects Intellect’s AI-first eMACH.ai Lending and PF Credit to modernize its loan origination. Kindly take the above information on record. Yours truly, for Intellect Design Arena Limited Prakash Bharadwaj Company Secretary and Compliance Officer ACS-37214Bulkley Valley Credit Union selects Intellect’s AI-first eMACH.ai Lending and PF Credit to modernize its loan origination Toronto, ON, March 19, 2026 - Intellect Design Arena, a financial technology company powering the world’s leading banks, credit unions, and insurance companies, is helping to transform Bulkley Valley Credit Union (BVCU)’s lending capability. MoUs & Agreements.pdf_text: March 19, 2026 The Manager- Listing BSE Limited (BSE: 507685) The Manager- Listing National Stock Exchange of India Limited (NSE: WIPRO) The Market Operations NYSE: New York (NYSE: WIT) Dear Sir/Madam, Sub: Press Release Please find attached herewith copy of the Press Release which is being released today. Thanking you, For Wipro Limited M Sanaulla Khan Company SecretaryWipro Launches GIFT City Hub to Accelerate AI‑Powered BFSI Transformation GANDHINAGAR, India – March 19, 2026: Wipro Limited (NYSE: WIT, BSE: 507685, NSE: WIPRO), a leading AI-powered technology services and consulting company, today announced the launch of a new hub at the Gujarat International Finance Tec-City (GIFT City), Gandhinagar. The initiative marks a milestone in strengthening Wipro’s capabilities to deliver advanced technology services to global Banking, Financial Services, and Insurance (BSFI) clients. Wipro’s expansion into GIFT City creates a strong foundation to accelerate the development of next‑generation, consulting-led and AI‑first financial services capabilities. Aligned with Wipro Intelligence™–the unified suite of AI‑powered platforms, solutions, and transformative offerings– the new hub will support the delivery of advanced solutions across areas such as digital banking and capital markets, along with regulatory technology, risk and compliance, and core platform modernization initiatives. The center strengthens Wipro’s ability to co‑innovate with clients, embed responsible AI across critical financial workflows, and scale secure, domain‑led platforms to meet the growing global demand for AI‑powered BFSI transformation. “GIFT City-IFSC is fast emerging as a global financial and technology hub, attracting leading enterprises from around the world,” said Deputy Chief Minister of Gujarat Shri Harsh Sanghavi. “Wipro's new center in the GIFT city reflects Gujarat's growing prominence as a destination for innovation and high value digital capabilities. Choice Mutual Fund has announced the launch of two new investment products — Choice Nifty 50 Index Fund and Choice Nifty Next 50 Index Fund, aimed at helping investors build a disciplined long-term equity exposure. The launch reflects Choice Mutual Fund’s philosophy of encouraging structured household investing through a simple framework that balances growth and risk management. The Bank will take appropriate steps, including contesting the Order through a writ petition within prescribed timelines. Please take the above information on record. Operational Alerts.headline: This is to inform that the company has achieved record single day coal booking under its recently introduced special discount scheme aimed at liquidation of coal stock. Under the scheme, ....
Operational Alerts.pdf_text: संधभ सं या.: बीसीसीएल: सीएस: एफ-Post-Listing:182(H) दनांक: 19.03.2026 सेवा म, सेवा म, Listing Department, Listing Department, Bombay Stock Exchange National Stock Exchange of India Limited, Mumbai-400051 Limited Mumbai-400051 Scrip Code 544678 Ref: ISIN – INE05XR01022 Sub: Disclosure under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements), Regulations 2015- Record Single Day Coal Booking under Special Discount Scheme This is to inform that the Company has achieved record single day coal booking under its recently introduced special discount scheme aimed at liquidation of coal stock. Under the scheme, discounts ranging from ₹100 to ₹600 per tonne were offered across various slabs, which received an encouraging response from consumers. During the e-auction conducted yesterday:  Rail Mode: Approximately 1,80,000 tonnes of coal were booked across 45 rakes  Road Mode: Approximately 56,850 tonnes of coal were booked Accordingly, the total coal booking stood at approximately 2,36,850 tonnes in a single day, marking a significant achievement for the Company. The strong response reflects the effectiveness of the Company’s consumer- centric policies. The higher booking through rail mode is expected to support key sectors such as steel and core industries. This is for your information and record please. Yours Faithfully, भवदय / भारत कोकंग कोल लमटेड के लए/ For Bharat Coking Coal Limited (देबानुज देबनाथ/Debanuj Debnath) कंपनी सचव एवं अनुपालन अधकार/ Company Secretary & Compliance Officer

Operational Alerts.headline: Glenmark Therapeutics Inc., USA launches Fluticasone Propionate Nasal Spray USP, 50 mcg per spray (OTC)
Operational Alerts.pdf_text: March 19, 2026 To, To, Dy. General Manager The Manager – Listing, Department of Corporate Services, The National Stock Exchange of India Ltd., BSE Ltd., Plot No. C/1, G Block, P. J. Towers, Dalal Street, Bandra Kurla Complex, Fort, Mumbai – 400 001. Bandra (E), Mumbai – 400 051. Ref: Scrip Code: 532296 Ref: Scrip Name: GLENMARK Dear Sir, Sub: Glenmark Therapeutics Inc., USA launches Fluticasone Propionate Nasal Spray USP, 50 mcg per spray (OTC) Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Limited (Glenmark) has received final approval by the United States Food & Drug Administration (U.S. FDA) for Fluticasone Propionate Nasal Spray USP, 50 mcg per spray (OTC). Glenmark’s Fluticasone Propionate Nasal Spray USP, 50 mcg per spray (OTC) has been determined by the FDA to be bioequivalent1 to the reference listed drug, Flonase®2 Allergy Relief Nasal Spray, 50 mcg per spray, of Haleon US Holding LLC [NDA – 205434]; and will be distributed in the U.S. by Glenmark Therapeutics Inc., USA. summaries.Fund Raise / QIP / NCD:
## 📋 Fund Raise / QIP / NCD — Pre-Market Briefing

---

- **Vardhman Polytex Ltd (514175)** — The board approved raising funds through Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) and Optionally Convertible Debentures (OCDs), and also approved selling or disposing of land; an EGM has been called to get shareholder approval for these moves.
- 📊 **Impact:** Neutral-to-Negative — The company is raising debt and selling land, which usually signals it needs cash urgently; that's a yellow flag worth watching.
- 👀 **Watch:** Whether the land sale price, once disclosed at the EGM, reflects fair market value or a distress sale.

---

- **Vardhman Polytex Ltd (514175)** — In a separate board decision, the company approved a preferential issue of OCDs specifically to non-promoter investors (exact amount not disclosed in the extract).
- 📊 **Impact:** Neutral — Issuing these convertible instruments to outside investors means they could eventually become shareholders, slightly diluting existing owners, but details are still thin.
- 👀 **Watch:** Who the non-promoter investors are and at what conversion price the OCDs will turn into equity shares.

---

- **Power & Instrumentation (Gujarat) Ltd (PIGL)** — The company allotted equity shares to investors by converting warrants that were issued earlier under a preferential issue (exact share count and price not provided in the extract).
- 📊 **Impact:** Neutral-to-Negative — New shares have just been added to the market, which means the existing shareholders' slice of the company just got a little smaller.
- 👀 **Watch:** How many total new shares were allotted and whether the warrant conversion price is above or below the current market price.

---

- **Samvardhana Motherson International Ltd (MOTHERSON)** — The board has scheduled a meeting to consider a Rights Issue to raise up to ₹5,000 Lakhs (₹50 crore).
- 📊 **Impact:** Neutral — A rights issue lets existing shareholders buy new shares at a (usually discounted) price; ₹50 crore is relatively small for a company of Motherson's size, so this is unlikely to shake the stock much.
- 👀 **Watch:** The rights issue price and ratio (e.g., 1 share for every X held) when announced, to see how big a discount existing shareholders are getting.

---

- **ECS Biztech Ltd (540063)** — The Rights Issue Committee approved the rights issue price, issue size, record date, and issue period (specific numbers not available in the extract provided).
- 📊 **Impact:** Neutral — Rights issue terms have been finalised, which is a routine step; the real question is whether the price is attractive enough for shareholders to actually participate.
- 👀 **Watch:** The official record date — shareholders who hold shares before that date are eligible to apply, so that date matters if you own or plan to buy this stock.

---

- **Gujarat Kidney and Super Speciality Ltd (GKSL)** — SBI Funds Management Limited is proceeding with an IPO for a stake sale by State Bank of India in this healthcare company (stake size and IPO price band not disclosed in the extract).
- 📊 **Impact:** Positive — Having SBI sell its stake via an IPO adds
summaries.Financial Results:
I'll be transparent with you before writing this briefing: **the announcements provided contain only headlines, not the actual financial documents or numbers.** As a responsible analyst, I will not fabricate revenue figures, profit numbers, or percentages that aren't in the source material. Here is what can be accurately reported:

---

- **Shree Ram Twistex Ltd (544716)**
  The company's board approved unaudited standalone financial results for Q3 and nine months ended December 31, 2025, along with a Limited Review Report from statutory auditors — but no actual numbers were shared in this filing.
  📊 **Impact:** Neutral — this is simply the company saying "we published our quarterly report card," which every listed company must do by law. Without the actual numbers, we can't say if it was a good or bad quarter.
  👀 **Watch:** The actual Q3 revenue and profit figures when the full results document becomes available on the BSE/NSE website.

---

- **Nirbhay Colours India Ltd (526349)**
  The company responded to a SEBI notice flagging that it had *not filed its quarterly results on time* as required under Regulation 33 of SEBI's Listing Obligations rules — no financial numbers were shared in this announcement.
  📊 **Impact:** Negative — imagine being called out by your school principal for missing a homework deadline. The company missed a legal filing deadline, which raises a small red flag about how seriously management takes rules.
  👀 **Watch:** Whether SEBI levies a financial penalty on the company or issues a stronger warning in the coming weeks.

---

- **Mid East Portfolio Management Ltd (526251)**
  The company re-submitted its December 2025 quarterly results after discovering a typo error in the original filing — no corrected numbers were included in this headline.
  📊 **Impact:** Neutral — this is like correcting a spelling mistake on a form; it happens and is not unusual, but it's worth checking whether the "typo" changed any important profit or revenue number.
  👀 **Watch:** What specifically was corrected — if the error was in a profit or revenue figure (even a typo), it could change how the quarter looks on paper.

---

- **Clean Max Enviro Energy Solutions Ltd (CLEANMAX)**
  The company published its unaudited standalone and consolidated financial results for Q3 and nine months ended December 31, 2025 in newspapers, as required — no actual financial figures were included in this announcement.
  📊 **Impact:** Neutral — routine compliance filing, no effect on stock. This is just the company telling the stock exchange "we put our results in the newspaper as the rules require."
  👀 **Watch:** The actual standalone vs. consolidated profit gap, which in energy companies can reveal how much the subsidiaries are contributing to growth.

---

- **Binny Ltd (514215)**
  The company published its unaudited financial results for the quarter ended December 31, **2024** in Business Standard (English) and Makkal (regional language) — notably, the filing references 2024, not 2025, which may indicate a delayed filing.
  📊 **Impact:** Negative (minor flag) — the date "December 2024" in a filing made in early 2026 suggests this result is significantly delayed, which is like a student submitting last year's assignment today — regulators and investors notice these things.
  👀 **Watch:** Whether SEBI flags Binny Ltd for the same late-filing non

👀 **Watch:** Whether Steag Energy Services India's revenues get added meaningfully to Bluspring's next quarterly results and at what valuation the deal was struck.

👀 **Watch:** When the deal formally closes and regulatory/competition approvals (if any) are received.

---

- **ICICI Lombard General Insurance Company Limited (ICICIGI)** — The company filed an intimation regarding acquisition of shares; specific numbers or deal size were not disclosed in the headline.

👀 **Watch:** The full disclosure filing to understand who the shares were acquired from, what stake was bought, and at what price.

---

---

👀 **Watch:** The total value of Airtel shares now held by Winro and whether the company plans to monetise this holding.

summaries.Management Changes:
• **Delhivery (DELHIVERY)** — Ms. Neelam Dhawan (former HP and Microsoft India head) appointed as Independent Director and Board Chairperson.

👀 **Watch:** Whether the new Director (Projects) accelerates tendering or execution of any stalled railway or infrastructure contracts.

---

• **Kuantum Papers (KUANTUM)** — Changes in management including appointments and re-designations of directors approved through a postal ballot process.
📊 **Impact:** Neutral — Shareholders have formally voted to approve these changes, so the process is clean and above-board, but there is no immediate business impact.
👀 **Watch:** Whether any newly designated director brings domain expertise that could signal a strategic shift toward higher-value paper products.

---

👀 **Watch:** Whether the Vice Chairman role comes with an expanded remit over deal-making or international partnerships, which would be a meaningful positive signal.

---

• **Sun Retail Ltd (542025)** — A Non-Executive Director has resigned from the company's board.

---

• **Gravita India (GRAVITA)** — An Independent Director has resigned from the board, disclosed under SEBI Regulation 30.
📊 **Impact:** Negative — An Independent Director resignation at a listed company always warrants attention because such directors are supposed to be the watchdogs for minority shareholders; losing one without a quick replacement weakens that oversight.
👀 **Watch:** Whether the resignation letter cites any governance concerns or disagreements with management, which SEBI rules require to be disclosed.

---

• **Punjab Communications Ltd (500346)** — A new Managing Director has been appointed effective March 10, 2026.
📊 **Impact:** Neutral — Appointment of a new MD at a small-cap company is significant for direction, but no financial details or strategic vision have been shared yet to judge impact.
👀 **Watch:** Whether the new MD announces any order wins, capital expenditure plans, or business restructuring within the first 90 days.

summaries.Mergers & Schemes:
